texto: Hey, Melissa-is there anything I should know about having this kid that isn't in the books I've been reading?"Sunlight streamed through the window, making the golden, hormone-induced mutton chops glisten upon my cheeks. As I waited for her answer, I thumbed through the glossy parenting magazines on her kitchen table.A candle flickered by the sink, adding sweetness to the spit-up scented air that was gutting punched in the face by a diaper change...
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Kim Bongiorno que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “Hey, Melissa-is there anything I should know about having this kid that isn't in the books I've b…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amizade, friends, humor, com foco em mudanca e termino.
